hero.subtitle: Authentic Uyghur cuisine crafted with tradition, served with soul. From hand-pulled noodles to flame-kissed kebabs — every dish tells a story of the ancient Silk Road.

about.title: A Taste of the Silk Road
about.text1: For centuries, the Silk Road carried more than silk and spices — it carried stories, traditions, and the flavors of a civilization. At Caravan, we honor the culinary heritage of the Uyghur people, bringing the warmth and richness of Central Asian cuisine to your table.
about.text2: Every dish is a journey — from hand-pulled laghman noodles stretched to order, to tender lamb slow-roasted with cumin and served on freshly baked naan. Our recipes have been passed down through generations, each one a testament to the artistry and soul of Uyghur cooking.
about.imageAlt: Traditional Uyghur tea and honey cake

featured.title: Signature Dishes
featured.subtitle: Hand-crafted with recipes passed down through generations of Uyghur tradition.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: From first-time visitors to devoted regulars, Caravan leaves a lasting impression.

location.title: Visit Us
location.subtitle: We're located in the heart of the city, ready to welcome you to the Silk Road.

footer.description: Authentic Uyghur cuisine from the heart of the Silk Road. Every dish tells a story of tradition, spice, and soul passed down through generations.

meta.homeDescription: Caravan brings the rich flavors of the Silk Road to your table. Authentic Uyghur cuisine featuring hand-pulled noodles, tender kebabs, and aromatic pilaf in New York.
meta.menuTitle: Menu — Caravan Uyghur Cuisine | Halal Restaurant NYC
meta.menuDescription: Browse our halal Uyghur menu: hand-pulled laghman, lamb kebabs, polo pilaf, samsa, manti dumplings, and more. 60 Beaver St, Financial District, NYC.

1.description: Tender marinated lamb threaded on skewers and grilled over open flame with cumin and chili flakes.

2.description: Juicy bone-in lamb chops seasoned with Uyghur spices, charred to perfection.

3.description: Whole rack slow-roasted with cumin, served with fresh herbs and house-made sauce.

4.description: Free-range chicken roasted with Silk Road spices until golden and crispy.

5.description: Hand-pulled noodles tossed in a savory tomato-pepper sauce with tender lamb and vegetables.

6.description: Hand-pulled noodles served with a rich, slow-cooked meat sauce on the side.

7.description: Stir-fried hand-pulled noodles with lamb, peppers, tomatoes, and aromatic spices.

8.description: Rich bone broth with hand-pulled noodles, tender beef slices, and fresh herbs.

9.description: Fragrant rice pilaf slow-cooked with lamb, carrots, onions, and raisins — the crown jewel of Uyghur cuisine.

10.description: Spicy braised chicken with potatoes and peppers, served over a bed of belt noodles.

11.description: Hearty slow-simmered lamb bone broth with root vegetables and warming spices.

12.description: Rustic stew of tender lamb and potatoes in a rich, cumin-scented broth.

13.description: Flaky baked pastry stuffed with seasoned lamb and onions, golden from the tandoor.

14.description: Traditional flatbread stuffed with spiced lamb, baked crispy in a clay oven.

15.description: Steamed dumplings filled with seasoned lamb, served with tangy yogurt and chili oil.

16.description: Tender sliced lamb served atop freshly baked naan bread with herbs and spices.

17.description: Wok-fired green beans with garlic, dried chilies, and Sichuan peppercorn.

18.description: Simple and savory stir-fried cabbage with vinegar, chili, and garlic.

19.description: Crisp cucumbers and ripe tomatoes tossed with herbs in a light vinaigrette.

20.description: Crunchy smashed cucumbers marinated in garlic, chili oil, and black vinegar.

21.description: Layered honey cake with walnuts and dried fruits, served with traditional tea.

22.description: Fragrant blend of dried roses, herbs, and goji berries steeped in a traditional pot.
